category_sources: Official bbe homepage describes it as a binary block editor and command-line tool.
source_facts.description says bbe is a sed-like editor for binary files.
docs_sources: Official bbe homepage links `Manual as one html page`.
Official bbe manual documents invocation, block definitions, commands, samples, and behavior.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official bbe homepage and SourceForge project page provide downloads/manuals but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official bbe homepage describes byte operations, blocks, command-line usage, and C implementation on SourceForge.
source_facts.description identifies a sed-like binary-file editor.
